/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_qcap2_processing.dir/tests/test_qcap2_processing.cpp.o -o test_qcap2_processing  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/lib" lib/libqcap2.processing.so lib/libqcap2.sync.so lib/libqcap2.formats.so lib/libqcap2.buffer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavfilter.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so
